Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disbuted Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Aprove the Compromise of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petititoner Ameenah Lutfee, the Guardian Ad Litem for Mamie Patton.
Petitioner was not present at today's hearing.
Order waiving Ms. Patton's appearance at today's hearing was filed on January 11, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $639.42.
Attorney's Fees - $155.04.
Costs - $19.26.

The net balance of $465.12 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 4054 MacArthur Boulevard, Oakland, Ca 94619 in the name of Mamie Patton. Petitioner Ameenah Latfee shall continue to manage this account for Ms. Patton's benefit.

The Court further Orders that the allocation of 20% of all net lawsuit proceeds to the wrongful death cause of action and to the claim of Mamie Patton is approved and shall apply to all future settlements, as described in Attachment 12.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Judge: Anderw Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared with petitioner Ameenah Lutfee, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for Mamie Patton.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $11,731.37.
Attorney's Fees - $1,355.42.
Costs - $6,309.69.

The net balance of $4,066.26 shall be deposited into an account with Bank of America, located at 4054 MacArthur Boulevard, Oakland, CA 94619, in the name of Mamie Patton, and Ameenah Lutfee shall continue to manage this account for Mamie's benefit with all all disbursemants therefrom being made on her behalf.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.
